server.name: 1Stay Hotels
server.description: Real-time hotel search and booking via MCP. The first MCP server that completes real hotel reservations inside AI conversations.

tools.name: search_hotels
tools.description: Search hotels worldwide by location and dates. Returns a ranked list of hotels with nightly rates, star ratings, distance, and hotel_id for each property. Covers major brands (Marriott, Hilton, IHG, Hyatt, Wyndham, Best Western, Choice), boutique, and independent properties. Use get_hotel_details with a hotel_id from these results to see rooms, live rates, and rate_codes before booking. Paginate with search_id and cursor from the response. Returns empty results if no availability matches.

location.description: City, address, venue, or landmark. Required unless latitude/longitude provided.

latitude.description: Latitude — skip geocoding if provided with longitude

longitude.description: Longitude — skip geocoding if provided with latitude

chain_code.description: Filter by hotel chain code (e.g. 'MC' for Marriott, 'HH' for Hilton)

search_id.description: Search ID from previous results — pass with cursor for next page

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from previous search response

tools.name: get_hotel_details
tools.description: Get room types, live rates, amenities, cancellation policies, and bookable rate_codes for a specific hotel. Returns each room option with rate_code, nightly rate, total price, cancellation policy, and room description. Call this after search_hotels to get a hotel_id — required before book_hotel because rate_codes expire in ~15 minutes. If the rate_code expires, call this again to get a fresh one. Guests pay the hotel directly; a 1Stay Booking Fee is added at checkout.

tools.name: book_hotel
tools.description: Book a hotel room. Returns a booking_id (stk_bk_xxxx), hotel confirmation number, and a secure checkout URL where the guest completes payment. NEVER collect credit card numbers, payment info, or billing details in conversation. Requires a valid rate_code from get_hotel_details (expires ~15 min) — if expired, call get_hotel_details again first. Guest pays the hotel directly. Loyalty points apply automatically. The checkout URL is valid for ~30 minutes.

hotel_id.description: Hotel ID from search or details results

rate_code.description: Rate code from get_hotel_details — you MUST call get_hotel_details first to get a valid rate_code before booking

guest_name.description: Full name of the primary guest

guest_phone.description: Phone number for the primary guest

external_reference_id.description: Your unique reference ID for this booking (for idempotency and retrieval)

tools.name: get_booking
tools.description: Look up a reservation by booking ID (stk_bk_xxxx) or hotel confirmation number. Returns hotel name, dates, guest info, rate, status, and cancellation policy. Scoped to bookings made through your API key. Use this for internal lookups when you already have the booking_id or confirmation number. For guest-facing lookups where identity must be verified, use retrieve_booking instead.

booking_id.description: Booking ID (e.g. stk_bk_xxxx) or hotel confirmation number

tools.name: cancel_booking
tools.description: Cancel a hotel reservation. Cannot be undone. Returns a cancellation confirmation number and updated booking status. Requires guest first and last name plus hotel confirmation number. Always confirm with the guest before proceeding — some rates are non-refundable. Cancellation confirmation is emailed to the address on file.

first_name.description: Guest first name on the reservation

last_name.description: Guest last name on the reservation

tools.name: retrieve_booking
tools.description: Find a reservation and resend the confirmation email. Returns a success/failure status but does not return booking details in conversation — confirmation is sent to the email on file to protect guest privacy. Requires identity verification: guest's first and last name plus at least one verification factor (email address used at booking, hotel confirmation number, or last four digits of card used). Use this for guest-facing lookups instead of get_booking, which is for internal use only.

email.description: Email address used when booking (optional verification factor)

last_four_card.description: Last 4 digits of card used to book (must also provide check_in_date)

check_in_date.description: Check-in date in YYYY-MM-DD format (required when using last_four_card verification)

updated_email.description: Resend confirmation to a different email address

tools.name: search_tools
tools.description: List available 1Stay hotel booking tools with descriptions and parameters. Returns tool names, descriptions, and input schemas. Filter by keyword: search, book, cancel, details. Omit keyword to list all tools. Use this when the user asks what 1Stay can do.

keyword.description: Keyword to filter tools (e.g. 'book', 'search', 'cancel'). Omit to list all tools.
